PHASE: Phase 7 #16 (department-binding-filter) — COMPLETE. Squash-merged to main 2026-05-19 as `fdfc3ca`. The IncomingCallDialog now filters `call:incoming` broadcasts by the current user's bound department(s) instead of ringing every org member. NEW `lib/calls/select-incoming-call.ts` (22 lines — pure helper per [[pure-helper-extraction-pattern]], returns false on `undefined` (loading) and `[]` (no binding), `Array.prototype.includes` for multi-binding correctness) + 4 RED→GREEN cases. NEW `departments.myBoundDepartmentIds` protectedProcedure query (~18 lines — read-only reverse lookup user → dept ids, returns `string[]` because `Department.default_user_id` has no `@unique` constraint, L6 scopes to org, no L5 audit log) + 3 RED→GREEN cases. MODIFIED `incoming-call-dialog.tsx` (+16/-6 — wires `trpc.departments.myBoundDepartmentIds.useQuery()` + `selectIncomingCall` filter, drops the Phase 7 #15 TODO block, `useEffect` dep array now includes `boundDeptIds`). Closes the only deferred-scope item from Phase 7 #15. End-to-end call routing now correct: caller initiates → `emitToOrg` fans out → only the bound user's dialog rings.
